explanations.1: This line declares that 'tags-manager' is a phony target, meaning it's not a real file—it's just a command you can run with 'make tags-manager'.
explanations.4: This checks if the ARGS variable is empty (after stripping whitespace); if it is, the code between here and 'else' will run to show an error message.
explanations.24: This line runs a Python script inside a Docker container, installing two Python libraries silently first, then passing your ARGS to the script so it can execute the tag management command you requested.
